zh.lifeSummary: 當Bernard de Rouergue於1130年出生在法國奧其坦尼羅特普盧多馬特時，他的父親Gerber II de Rouergue20歲，母親wife Gerbert16歲。他於1150年之前與Ermengarde de GRAMAT在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1212年在他的家鄉享年82歲，埋葬在法國奧其坦尼羅特普盧多馬特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Bernard de Rouergue于1130年出生在法国奧其坦尼羅特普盧多馬特时，他的父亲Gerber II de Rouergue20岁，母亲wife Gerbert16岁。他于1150年之前与Ermengarde de GRAMAT在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1212年在他的家乡享年82岁，埋葬在法国奧其坦尼羅特普盧多馬特。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bernard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from ber(n) ‘bear’ + hard ‘hardy, brave, strong’. This was the name of three famous medieval churchmen: St Bernard of Menthon ( 923–1008 ), founder of a hospice on each of the Alpine passes named after him; the monastic reformer St Bernard of Clairvaux ( 1090–1153 ); and the scholastic philosopher Bernard of Chartres. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. A native Old English form, Beornheard, was superseded by the Norman form.

en.lifeSummary: When Bernard de Rouergue was born in 1130, in Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, France, his father, Gerber II de Rouergue, was 20 and his mother, wife Gerbert, was 16. He married Ermengarde de GRAMAT before 1150, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1212, in his hometown, at the age of 82, and was buried in Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Bernard de Rouergue est né en 1130, à Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, France, son père, Gerber II de Rouergue, avait 20 ans et sa mère, wife Gerbert, avait 16 ans. Il a épousé Ermengarde de GRAMAT avant 1150, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1212, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 82 ans, et a été enterré à Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Bernard de Rouergue 1130 in Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Gerber II de Rouergue 20 und seine Mutter wife Gerbert 16. Er hat vor 1150 in Europa Ermengarde de GRAMAT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1212 im Alter von 82 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard de Rouergue è nato il nel 1130 nel Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, Francia, il suo padre, Gerber II de Rouergue, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, wife Gerbert, aveva 16 anni. Lui sposato Ermengarde de GRAMAT prima del 1150, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1212, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 82 anni, e fu sepolto a Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Bernard de Rouergueが1130年にフランスオクシタニーロトプルドhオマトで生まれた時，父Gerber II de Rouergueは20歳，母wife Gerbertは16歳であった。1150年以前にヨーロッパでErmengarde de GRAMATと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1212年に故郷で82歳で死去し，フランスオクシタニーロトプルドhオマトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Bernard de Rouergue(이)가 1130년 프랑스 옥시탠이 로트 프루드홈앳에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Gerber II de Rouergue(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 wife Gerbert(은)는 16세였다. 그는 1150년 이전 우럽에서 Ermengarde de GRAMAT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1212년 그의 고향에서 82세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 옥시탠이 로트 프루드홈앳에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Bernard de Rouergue nasceu em 1130, em Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, França, seu pai, Gerber II de Rouergue, tinha 20 anos e sua mãe, wife Gerbert, tinha 16 anos. Ele casou-se com Ermengarde de GRAMAT antes 1150, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1212, em sua cidade natal, com 82 anos, e foi sepultado em Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Bernard de Rouergue родился в 1130 г. в местности прудхомат, лот, окситани, Франция, его отцу по имени Gerber II de Rouergue было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали wife Gerbert, 16. Он женился на женщине по имени Ermengarde de GRAMAT перед 1150 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1212 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 82 лет и был похоронен в местности прудхомат, лот, окситани, Франция.

sm.from 1155 to 1170: mai le 1155 e o'o I le 1170

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Bernard de Rouergue nació en 1130, en Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, Francia, su papá, Gerber II de Rouergue, tenía 20 años y su mamá, wife Gerbert, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Ermengarde de GRAMAT antes de 1150, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1212, en su pueblo, a la edad de 82 años, y fue sepultado en Prudhomat, Lot, Occitanie, Francia.
